Most residential properties require monthly treatments during mosquito season (May through September) for optimal protection. faqs.question: How often do I need mosquito treatments in Hempstead?
faqs.answer: For best results in Hempstead, we recommend treatments every 3-4 weeks during mosquito season, which typically runs from late spring through early fall. Long Island's climate and proximity to water bodies means mosquitoes can remain active from May through October. Our seasonal packages provide consistent protection throughout peak mosquito months.

faqs.question: Are mosquito control treatments safe for my family and pets in Hempstead?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-registered products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our certified technicians. Treatments dry within 30 minutes, after which your yard is safe for normal use. We focus on targeted application to mosquito breeding and resting areas, minimizing exposure while maximizing effectiveness around your Hempstead property.

faqs.question: What areas of my Hempstead property will you treat for mosquitoes?
faqs.answer: We treat all mosquito breeding and resting areas on your Hempstead property, including shaded areas under trees and shrubs, around decks and patios, along fence lines, near standing water sources, and in vegetation where mosquitoes hide during the day. Our technicians also identify and recommend eliminating standing water in gutters, flower pots, and other containers to prevent breeding.
